E4 - A 300 ton-Journey
programme.desc: Super heavy, super high and super wide. Autoclaves are the names of the metal giants in which aircraft parts are to be produced from a wide variety of materials under extreme pressure and heat. But it is a long and dangerous way to get there. The two autoclaves weigh over 300 tonnes and have to be transported over a distance of 100 kilometres. A challenge that is anything but easy and involves many risks and hurdles. It is a single obstacle course. From overhead cables hanging too low at level crossings, to bridges that cannot withstand the weight, to narrow roads and steep inclines. And all this in miserable weather and slush. It is a battle for centimetres, there's not a second to lose attention, not an obstacle to be overlooked.

programme.title: E1 - Food’s New Frontiers
programme.desc: Space foods, initially created just for astronauts, has now facilitated a revolution in agricultural and alternative food production. This revolution is changing the way we think about producing food in the future. In Finland, protein-rich foods are produced from thin air, making food production possible in a variety of environments, including deserts, cities, and even outer space. Scientists in the United States are working to make mushroom cultivation more sustainable, while in Austria, seeds are exposed to space radiation to improve their yield when grown back on Earth. A startup in Singapore is using space technology to enhance the security of livestock herds, and at NUS, a team has developed a remarkable hydrogel that makes crop cultivation more water-efficient.

programme.title: Hidden Doors! Exploring The Unknown World 'Africa'
programme.desc: Aiba Masaki hosts a brand‑new overseas travel show like no other. He visits hidden places rarely introduced in Japanese media, guided by local residents, and also travels abroad to thank the people who make the everyday items we rely on. From stunning scenery and unique cuisine to surprising lifestyles and unexpected ties to Japan, the show uncovers the world's hidden secrets.

programme.title: E87
programme.desc: Masaharu (Tamayama Tetsuji), who travels alone to Scotland to learn the art of whisky making, meets Ellie (Charlotte Kate Fox) and falls in love. Masaharu dreams of creating Japan's first domestically produced whisky, while Ellie, who has left her homeland and come to Japan for the first time, faces a series of challenges. This is the story of love and adventure as Massan and Ellie, united by the strength of their bond, through a turbulent era with unwavering resolve.

programme.title: E20 - Out Of Site
programme.desc: Brenda learns that it is important to work as a team and not just care about her own jobs.

programme.title: E37 - Sleepover
programme.desc: Stanley helps Hettie with a sleepover at the museum for some of the children. They do a treasure hunt and a night-time picnic, but antics ensue when they clean up after themselves.

programme.title: E21 - I Will Get A Football For My Birthday.
programme.desc: Parties, presents, and lots of cake! The animals chat about everything they love about birthdays!

programme.title: E47 - Cricket
programme.desc: During a friendly game of neighbourhood cricket, the dads struggle to bowl Rusty out.

programme.title: E1 - Bedroom
programme.desc: Chilli and Bandit transform the old nursery into a new bedroom for Bluey. In the process, Bluey and Bingo amicably divide their belongings, but get absorbed by trading items and swapping notes at bedtime. Ultimately, when Bluey misses her sister, she asks to return to her old room.

programme.title: E52 - The Glasses Badge
programme.desc: When Mole was young he wanted to be a Stunt Mole! Can Duggee and the squirrels help make his dreams come true?

programme.title: E14 - Spinach
programme.desc: It's the exceptional painter, Spinach, creating Kiwi's portrait, if Kiwi can keep still.

programme.title: E51 - Waltzing Potato
programme.desc: Evil Pea plans to freeze Supertato into an ice cube by pretending to teach him to dance.

programme.title: E8 - Watch The Birdie
programme.desc: Preston needs Mojo and Bo to pull his big balloon to a place where he can snap a picture of a rare bird. But his balloon gets loose, and Mojo and Bo need to get Preston back on the ground.

programme.title: E30 - Pan-American Highway, Panama
programme.desc: The team's Pan-American road trip leads them to discover that Glitch is building a road through the Darien Gap. Can they save this important habitat and protect the local sloths?

programme.title: E50 - Shaun
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo want a pet. To show them how much work they'd be in for, Dad gets to transform his hand into their old friend Shaun, a chaotic, undisciplined Emu with a taste for trouble.

programme.title: E17 - Pavlova
programme.desc: Mum won't let Bingo have Pavlova, so the kids find a way by playing a cheeky game of Cafe in the kitchen. But Dad the chef sets up a competing shop that only serves edamame beans.

programme.title: E18 - Rain
programme.desc: When a heavy summer rain thunders over the Heeler home, Bluey is determined to dam the water in the front yard, while Mum tries to stop her constantly tracking mud into the house.

programme.title: E25 - The Going Slow Badge
programme.desc: The Squirrels are rushing around, so Duggee shows them how to take a slower pace.

programme.title: E21 - All Tracks Lead To Rome
programme.desc: Thomas is working on the Italian Railway, keen to prove to his new friend Gina that he is an expert in all things Italian.

programme.title: E38 - Mayor Stan
programme.desc: Myrtle declares Stanley Mayor for a day. He soon finds there is a dance class and new barn to open with lots of ribbon cutting, and he even fits in making a Bowling alley.

programme.title: E37 - Sleepover
programme.desc: Stanley helps Hettie with a sleepover at the museum for some of the children. They do a treasure hunt and a night-time picnic, but antics ensue when they clean up after themselves.

programme.title: E47 - Cricket
programme.desc: During a friendly game of neighbourhood cricket, the dads struggle to bowl Rusty out.

programme.title: E52 - The Glasses Badge
programme.desc: When Mole was young he wanted to be a Stunt Mole! Can Duggee and the squirrels help make his dreams come true?

programme.title: E5 - I'm Hungry
programme.desc: King Tiger and the Jelly wonder what Duggee has planned for today. Tag wants a snack, Enid has a musical cheese chase, and Norrie has a haircut.

programme.title: E16 - Lychee
programme.desc: Love and peace symbol, Lychee, performs his song - 'All You Need is Lychee!'

programme.title: E51 - Waltzing Potato
programme.desc: Evil Pea plans to freeze Supertato into an ice cube by pretending to teach him to dance.

programme.title: E52 - Broccoli's Movie Night
programme.desc: Broccoli screens Supertato: The Movie, but Evil Pea has plans to change the story.

programme.desc: The Squirrels are rushing around, so Duggee shows them how to take a slower pace.

programme.desc: Myrtle declares Stanley Mayor for a day. He soon finds there is a dance class and new barn to open with lots of ribbon cutting, and he even fits in making a Bowling alley.

programme.desc: During a friendly game of neighbourhood cricket, the dads struggle to bowl Rusty out.

programme.title: The Alibi[Live]
programme.desc: Vincent, an heir to a news empire, gets accused of killing his rival, Walter. To protect his reputation, he hires Stella, an escort with her own haunted past, to pose as his alibi. What begins as a transactional arrangement soon becomes dangerously real as their shared wounds and ambitions draw them together. But when they uncover the truth, the two are compelled to confront their true feelings.

programme.title: The Banquet
programme.desc: “The Banquet” assembled star-studded cast that aimed for charity to support disaster relief efforts at that time. Adapted from the 1959 Cantonese film of the same name and co-directed by Tsui Hark, Clifton Ko, Joe Cheung, and Alfred Cheung, the film tells the story of a greedy couple deceiving their estranged father to secure a huge amount business deal with oil producing country. While they pretend to welcome the father into their home and prepare a birthday banquet for him, rival also throws a competing banquet...With continuous top-star cameos offering countless surprises and laughs, this film remains remarkable, entertaining and meaningful to audience nowadays.

programme.title: Crime Story
programme.desc: Eddie Chan, a guilt-ridden cop trying to silence his demons from a recent shoot-out who is assigned to rescue kidnapped businessman Huang Yifei. It is a trail that leads Chan and his partner, Hung from Hong Kong to Taipei and back to Hong Kong. As the trail gets warmer, Chan begins to suspect that there are internal forces – including Hung – who seem to working against him...

programme.title: Honest Candidate 2
programme.desc: After failing to win the Seoul mayoral election, Joo Sang-sook became an unemployable property and no parties will admit to associating with her in fear of bad press, but when she rescues a young man from drowning, she is suddenly pulled into spotlight and wins the election to become the Gangwon province governor. But her honesty sinks her approval rating and she resorts back to lying through her teeth. As fate would have it, her truth mouth returns! Not only that, her chief of staff Hee-cheol is cursed with the same truth bomb!

programme.title: Troll Factory
programme.desc: Talented yet arrogant city desk journalist Lim Sang-jin investigates corruption within the major corporation Manjun, only to have his report debunked as a hoax, leading to his integrity being questioned. “Your article wasn't false. It was a trick that we orchestrated” Then one day, a suspicious tip is sent to Lim. The mysterious whistleblower introduces himself as a member of the online opinion manipulation team known as Team Alep, which fabricated both truth and lies for the right price...Where does the truth begin and the lie end?

programme.title: Baogu At the Movie E274 -Night King
programme.desc: Baogu At The Movie brings you the most exclusive behind the scenes of recent local blockbusters. The most true story and sincere conversation behind every piece of dreamwork.

programme.title: Baogu Produces -Falling into the Abyss of the Heart
programme.desc: Cheung Siu Fai shares his unforgettable memories filming for the movie “Reborn”. He reveals that his hug with Venus Wong had sparked a “spousal” chemistry even before the filming began, and he also tells how he was once stuck in negative emotions after the filming ended. In spite of the story setting, he affirms that this is not a horror film. Follow Siu Fai and more behind-the-scene stories are to be unveiled.

programme.title: Baogu At the Movie E274 -Night King
programme.desc: Baogu At The Movie brings you the most exclusive behind the scenes of recent local blockbusters. The most true story and sincere conversation behind every piece of dreamwork.

programme.title: Baogu Produces -Falling into the Abyss of the Heart
programme.desc: Cheung Siu Fai shares his unforgettable memories filming for the movie “Reborn”. He reveals that his hug with Venus Wong had sparked a “spousal” chemistry even before the filming began, and he also tells how he was once stuck in negative emotions after the filming ended. In spite of the story setting, he affirms that this is not a horror film. Follow Siu Fai and more behind-the-scene stories are to be unveiled.

programme.title: DAY OFF
programme.desc: For forty years A-Rui has been running a barbershop, a small place where she has seen happiness and sorrow, ebb and flow. Faced with all the troubles in her life, A-Rui fully commits to her work and defeat is never an option for her, but her children never appreciate it and treat her profession with disdain. One day, A-Rui receives a phone call from the family of an old regular client who moved far away a long time ago. The family asks A-Rui if she would be willing to travel to cut the hair for the bedridden old man. Reminded of what her master taught her, “Always provide your best service,” A-Rui decides to hang up the “Day Off” sign and closes her shop for one day. She drives her beat-up old car and embarks on a long journey to do something others think is not worthwhile.

programme.title: Baogu Produces -Falling into the Abyss of the Heart
programme.desc: Cheung Siu Fai shares his unforgettable memories filming for the movie “Reborn”. He reveals that his hug with Venus Wong had sparked a “spousal” chemistry even before the filming began, and he also tells how he was once stuck in negative emotions after the filming ended. In spite of the story setting, he affirms that this is not a horror film. Follow Siu Fai and more behind-the-scene stories are to be unveiled.

E205 - The Other Mutanimals
programme.desc: Desperate to save Wingnut from Tokka, Rahzar, & the Monster Mutanimals, Donnie delves deeper into the lab of a mad scientist. Meanwhile, his brothers follow another Tokka to the Staten Island lab... only for things to take a disastrous turn!

programme.title: E262 - A Cabin in the Kelp / The Hankering
programme.desc: The Gal Pals take Pearl to a cabin in the woods for a weekend of silly pranks. // Mr. Krabs has a secret taste for something surprising.

programme.title: E104 - The Parent Zap
programme.desc: After Phoebe and Max let Chloe's friends watch a horror movie and eat candy, Jinx and Booch's parents want to meet Chloe's. With Hank and Barb away, Max and Phoebe transform into them to help Chloe. It goes well until the real Hank and Barb show up.

programme.title: E215 - Alien Zoo
programme.desc: When Danger Force becomes the newest exhibit at an Alien Zoo, Miles must find a way to break them out before they become alien dinner.

programme.title: E410 - Budget Cuts
programme.desc: When the Vice Mayor cuts Captain Man and Kid Danger's budget to build a high speed railway in Swellview, Captain Man and Kid Danger must figure out creative ways to save money.

programme.title: E105 - Meats of Strength / Dead Ed's
programme.desc: Jack's new friend Beef invites him to a sleepover. Jack, a sleepover newb, freaks out over impressing his new friend. // Jack & Lil try to prove they're the one true local, enduring a series of bizarre quests in the local dive restaurant Dead Ed's.

programme.title: E199 - Sold! / Lame and Fortune
programme.desc: When SpongeBob and Patrick think their homes have been sold, they move away - much to Squidward’s delight. // When fortune cookies start predicting the future, Plankton realizes he can twist them to his own evil schemes.

programme.title: E313 - Wary Gary
programme.desc: SpongeBob goes to extreme lengths to trick Gary into going to the vet.

programme.title: E105 - Mar-Snoop / Canteen Carnage
programme.desc: On her quest to get her own Marsupilami, Bibi encounters a Jaguar which scares her enough to give up the hunt. // Marcel gets a job as the school chef after Jade causes the usual one to quit.

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: The love and success story of a self-made jjajangmyeon delivery driver.

programme.title: Trip to Louisiana
programme.desc: Zoe and Milo have formed a band. They want Alim to be part of it, but the hamster insists on using empty cans as drums. For Zoe and Milo, that is not a proper instrument. Alim knows it's possible to play music with all sorts of things. It's time for a trip to Louisiana.

programme.title: Ebb the Wonder Dog
programme.desc: Flo plans a Circus Show for Granny's birthday with Ebb and Bird. Ebb doesn't want to learn new tricks but Bird does. A nosey gull makes Ebb bark twice and it seems Ebb can count to 2! Flo's show is a great success. Things couldn't be better.

programme.title: Courtly Love
programme.desc: Dove is going through a rocky time with her horrible husband, Lord Roach. She consequently falls for Sir Howler. Despite being humble and loyal, Howler isn't always a paragon of finesse when it comes to winning the lady's heart or dealing with the jealous spouse!

programme.title: Do Giants Like Hexagons?
programme.desc: The Giant's Causeway in Northern Ireland is made up of around 40,000 interlocking basalt columns, most of which are hexagonal. Nature is very efficient, so it uses this hexagonal arrangement in many places, such as bubbles and beehives.

programme.title: The Day Henry Met....a Brush
programme.desc: Henry visits the Pet Groomers with his pet dog. There he meets a Brush and becomes a Pet Groomer.

programme.title: Veranica Tchalabaeva: Winning Poodle Squad
programme.desc: The GUINNESS WORLD RECORDS title for the most times a dog passes through a roller pushed by a dog in one minute is held by Veranica Tchalabaeva and her dogs. Veranica shares the basics of dog training and what it takes to become the best in the world.

programme.title: Do Giants Like Hexagons?
programme.desc: The Giant's Causeway in Northern Ireland is made up of around 40,000 interlocking basalt columns, most of which are hexagonal. Nature is very efficient, so it uses this hexagonal arrangement in many places, such as bubbles and beehives.

programme.title: Making It Happen
programme.desc: It's time for coach Luke to give his Birmingham boys the news they've been waiting for. Who's made it onto the National Squad and is going to Lillishall for intensive training with the national coaches? Back in Bristol, Chase has an exciting training day ahead of him.

programme.title: Overcoming Fears
programme.desc: Sam and Morgan operate on Gandalf the falcon's lumpy foot. And the Junior Vets are about to find out what real vet work is all about. But will Saira overcome her fear of big dogs to help stray hound Jessie, who needs life-changing surgery?

programme.title: Trip to Botswana
programme.desc: Zoe and Milo are frustrated looking for straws, and Alim responds only with clicking sounds. Alim then takes them to Botswana to meet Ketelelo, who shows them the San language, which uses clicking sounds, and how to handle a black mamba snake!

programme.title: Flowerpocalypse
programme.desc: Thumbelina arrives at the campus Flower Festival with her mother, who controls all magical flowers in Fairy Tale Land. Vicky grows the evil Rebel Roses, causing chaos. LingLing is caught in the ruckus, and only Travis can save her.

programme.title: What Makes Chocolate so Tasty?
programme.desc: During roasting, a chemical reaction called the Maillard reaction changes the bitter taste of cocoa beans to the chocolate flavour we love. This reaction also creates the taste, smell and golden browning of toast, cakes, grilled and roasted meats.

programme.title: Atlantic Puffin
programme.desc: Franky thinks the puffins on TV must be robots, and Tiny Owl worries that he might not be the cutest critter in town anymore as Mommy and Daddy fall in love with the puffins on TV. Grandad Badger tells Binah about the time he was a circus clown.

programme.title: Alex Goulding and Jimmy Choi: Feats of Strength Duo
programme.desc: Ninja warrior Jimmy and fitness fanatic Alex reveal how they worked together to achieve the GUINNESS WORLD RECORDS title for the most consecutive double high-five push-ups! The powerful duo meets Aisheshek Magauina and shares what it takes to work as a team.

programme.title: What Makes Chocolate so Tasty?
programme.desc: During roasting, a chemical reaction called the Maillard reaction changes the bitter taste of cocoa beans to the chocolate flavour we love. This reaction also creates the taste, smell and golden browning of toast, cakes, grilled and roasted meats.

programme.title: Do Giants Like Hexagons?
programme.desc: The Giant's Causeway in Northern Ireland is made up of around 40,000 interlocking basalt columns, most of which are hexagonal. Nature is very efficient, so it uses this hexagonal arrangement in many places, such as bubbles and beehives.

programme.title: Double Emergency
programme.desc: There's a double emergency at the Vet School. Edward, the ferret, is seriously ill, having stopped eating, and a sick cow with a mystery illness needs investigating. Can the Junior Vets cope when things go wrong?

programme.title: Trip to Botswana
programme.desc: Zoe and Milo are frustrated looking for straws, and Alim responds only with clicking sounds. Alim then takes them to Botswana to meet Ketelelo, who shows them the San language, which uses clicking sounds, and how to handle a black mamba snake!

programme.title: TÊTe à TÊTe

programme.title: E2 - The Wild West
programme.desc: Trek through the Canadian rainforest, look up at dizzying redwood trees, and explore giant kelp forests with Lizzie as she experiences the wild west coast of North America. Cross paths with wolves and bears while salmon travel upstream to lay eggs.

programme.title: E3 - Crowded Seas
programme.desc: Dip into North America’s southern coastal waters, where opalescent squid mate, sea turtles nest, and mobula rays take flight for the sake of romance. Fly a specialized drone with Lizzie as she swoops in for a breath sample from a blue whale.

programme.title: E1 - The Rescuers
programme.desc: Dogs around the world come to the rescue in surprising ways. Some search for survivors when disaster strikes or rescue animals from poachers and wildlife traffickers. Others help us in times of trouble—both on land and in the water.

programme.title: E2 - The Lifesavers
programme.desc: Meet a border collie that protects aircraft from lethal bird strikes, a sprocker spaniel whose sense of smell is saving imperilled water voles, and an Anatolian shepherd that helps conserve Africa’s most endangered big cat, the cheetah.

programme.title: E5 - Badalo is Missing
programme.desc: Watch the Onçafari team get to know Aroeira, their newly collared female, and take a peek at Aurora’s cub, Apolo. Continue to track Badalo, who has moved deeper into the flooded forest, where he puts Lizzie’s game-changing research in jeopardy.

programme.title: E5 - Grasslands
programme.desc: Explore one of Earth’s most vital but overlooked habitats and learn how grasslands could slow climate change by soaking up more carbon than forests do. Meet key species, such as bison and pumas, that could restore this resource and heal our planet.

programme.title: E5 - Australia
programme.desc: It’s a UNESCO World Heritage Site, the largest sand island on earth, and home to wild dingoes, six-foot sand-worms, and eucalyptus woodlands. Find out how everything lives happily together in a complex ecosystem built entirely upon sand.

programme.title: E4 - The Southern Drylands
programme.desc: The Southern Drylands is a journey into the most arid and extreme environments in the furthest reaches of southern Africa. We go to spectacular but treacherous places where almost no rain falls, to find incredibly resilient creatures and learn the secrets to their survival. From the largest mammals to the fastest insects and even a ghost-like fish found nowhere else in the world, the Southern Drylands contain some extraordinary inhabitants, all connected by the daily challenges of living in some of most inhospitable habitats in the world.

E10 - Challah Pigs In A Blanket & Challah Monkey Bread
programme.desc: Pigs in a blanket are the quintessential party finger food. The problem is, you can never eat just one! These full-sized hotdogs wrapped in soft challah are the perfect solution.

programme.title: E2
programme.desc: Join Jason Wang to explore the Pagoda of Once Cut Pork, a renowned Taiwanese dish where Chef Hong Ming skillfully carves pork belly into a delectable, melt-in-your-mouth “pagoda” with precision knife work.

programme.title: E1 - Not So Friendly Skies
programme.desc: Airline drama is at an all-time high and we've got the viral videos to prove it. See what happens when people are caught on camera acting up and acting out. We're headed for the not-so-friendly skies.

programme.title: E11
programme.desc: The long-awaited grand opening finally arrives. However, trouble strikes for Na-rae's team even before business begins. At the cafe, they face a shortage of cups.

programme.title: E19
programme.desc: The punk princess of pastry, Anna Polyviou returns with a Pressure Test created especially for this challenge. Never has an egg on toast looked so sweet - or intimidating - as Anna's “Sunny Side Up”.

programme.title: E3 - Turk-Ish Leek Burgers & Peach Crumb Bars
programme.desc: Jake is inspired by two dishes he learned from his mother-in-law and grandmother. The first is a Turkish leek burger. For dessert, it's a variation of his grandmother's cake with peach crumb bars.

programme.title: E2 - Best Of 1
programme.desc: The best moments of the show.

programme.title: E14 - Claire Vallee
programme.desc: Claire Vallee is the first vegan chef in France and Europe to earn a Michelin star. This title has allowed her to champion her cause: a cuisine of non animal origin. On today's menu: a recipe using edible seaweed with Polynesian influences.

programme.title: E3 - Greening Of The North
programme.desc: The rapid growth of shrubs and plants in areas where there used to be very little or even no vegetation raises questions. What are the effects on biodiversity, the landscape and the population? What can be expected in the long term?

programme.title: E5 - Community Spirit
programme.desc: Community spirit has always been important in farming. It is alive today, especially among the new generation which prefers a farming model that is based more on cooperation than competition.

programme.title: E13 - On The Trail Of La Fayette
programme.desc: Loic Ballet follows the trail of the Marquis de La Fayette and meets specialists of this famous historical figure.

programme.title: E12 - Verzasca Valley
programme.desc: At Gerra, we discover the Legends Trail, which takes us to Brione Verzasca, where we meet a member of the Bobosco group. The route then takes us to Lavertezzo for cheese tasting and a diving lesson in the river.

programme.title: E1804
programme.desc: The Bastide, Estrela, Salama, Levy, Berville and Alami families, plus a host of supporting characters, live and work in the modern everyday city of Montpellier, in southern France. Between romance and crime thriller, with a blend of comic and serious themes, their stories weave a fascinating web.

programme.title: E2 - Aicha Bastien N'diaye (Guinea)
programme.desc: Born to a mother from the Wendat Nation and a Guinean father, Aicha was raised in Wendake, Quebec, between African drums and Indigenous dances. A multidisciplinary artist, she defends her roots through her art and actions, and fights for the preservation of ancestral territories.

programme.title: E1 - Twinkle's Most Magical Moments!
programme.desc: Join Twinkle the star for her most magical moments! When Max, Muffin & Bao Bao build a toy train, Twinkle transforms into a real train & takes the kids on a ride all around the house! Then, when Max pretends he's a wizard, Twinkle turns into a magic wand to make his magic real! Her powers continue as she brings fruits & veggies to life for a puppet show & turns into a giant wibbly-wobbly jelly for everyone to play on! It's always magical with Twinkle!

programme.title: E1 - A Big Day of Fun & Learning!
programme.desc: Join Mia & Max for a big day of fun & learning! First, they go on a lovely little train ride with Tootson & their special friend Twinkle to learn all about shapes. Then, they hop on the Big Red Bus with Daddy, moving their hands like wheels going 'round & wipers going 'swish'! The learning continues as they have a musical drumming session with saucepans, play a game of 'What's In The Bag?' & learn about the world around them while singing & dancing.

programme.title: E1 - Learning to Do the Right Thing!
programme.desc: Join Buster as he learns to do the right thing! When Buster accidentally breaks the class flower, he panics & tries to cover it up, but soon learns that telling the truth is always the best thing to do. Then, when he & Daddy spot a steam train speeding out of control, they know they have to do the right thing! They race after the train & save the day! From cleaning up his toys to helping a puppy, Buster is always trying to do the right thing.

programme.title: E4 - Answering Big Questions!
programme.desc: Blippi is answering some of life's biggest questions! He shrinks down for a night adventure in a mouth to learn the right way to brush teeth from Bill Brushy. Then, he flies up a nose to find out what makes us sneeze! His curiosity continues as he learns how a fly can walk upside down on the ceiling, discovers the artistic process of how spiders make their webs & even becomes a contestant on a game show to learn the difference between fruits & vegetables!

programme.title: E6 - When I Grow Up I Want To Be!
programme.desc: Join Baby John as he learns about all the things he can be when he grows up! His adventure starts with a school trip to the fire station, where the kids learn what to do in an emergency & how firefighters are true superheroes! Then, he learns about all the different community helpers, like police officers & doctors. The learning continues as he discovers all about traffic lights & road safety while playing with his new toy car.

programme.title: E2 - Cody Is a Good Brother & a Good Friend
programme.desc: Join Cody as he learns how to be a good brother & a good friend! In a heartwarming moment, Cody finds out he's going to be a big brother. After some initial nerves, he spends a special day with his mama & her baby bump. Then, the big day arrives as the family brings his new sister, Kendi, home! Watch Cody take on his new role, helping Kendi get to sleep & learning to play new games together like bouncing a balloon.

programme.title: E1 - Learning to Do the Right Thing!
programme.desc: Join Buster as he learns to do the right thing! When Buster accidentally breaks the class flower, he panics & tries to cover it up, but soon learns that telling the truth is always the best thing to do. Then, when he & Daddy spot a steam train speeding out of control, they know they have to do the right thing! They race after the train & save the day! From cleaning up his toys to helping a puppy, Buster is always trying to do the right thing.

programme.title: E1 - Stopping Weasel's Wacky Schemes!
programme.desc: Gecko is busy stopping Mr. Weasel's wacky schemes! First, Gecko & Weasel face off in a football match, but Weasel starts cheating! Gecko must fix his damaged teammates & teach Weasel a lesson. Then, Bobby the Bus's battery goes missing, & all clues point to Weasel! The schemes continue as Weasel tries to show off at a 'fix up fair' but needs rescuing, & he steals cakes from a bake sale but ends up crashing!

programme.title: E7 - Twinkle's Bedtime Lullaby
programme.desc: Little Baby Bum is here to help you fall to sleep; with soothing, relaxing animated lullabies. These gentle and sensory videos are accompanied by lullaby versions of much loved nursery rhymes, helping to take you to the land of nod.

programme.title: E2 - Underwater Learning Adventures!
programme.desc: Dive into some underwater learning adventures with The Sharksons! First, join the sea friends as they swim through the alphabet to learn their ABCs. Then, explore the vibrant hues of Splashy Reef with a journey to learn all the shades of a beautiful rainbow. The learning continues with important daily routines! Sing along with Tucker the Turtle as he takes a bath & watch as Baby Grub eagerly learns the importance of dental care by brushing her big, sharp shark teeth!

programme.title: E5 - JJ Learns to Share, Help & Be Kind!
programme.desc: JJ is learning all about how to share, help & be kind! First, he learns the magic words 'please' & 'thank you,' & what to do when you make a mistake. The lessons continue as JJ, YoYo & TomTom show how much fun it is to share their snacks & toys. Being kind also means being helpful, & JJ's family loves to help each other around the house. From using good manners at the table to learning how to wait in line, it's a day of learning to be a good friend & family member!

programme.title: E4 - Answering Big Questions!
programme.desc: Blippi is answering some of life's biggest questions! He shrinks down for a night adventure in a mouth to learn the right way to brush teeth from Bill Brushy. Then, he flies up a nose to find out what makes us sneeze! His curiosity continues as he learns how a fly can walk upside down on the ceiling, discovers the artistic process of how spiders make their webs & even becomes a contestant on a game show to learn the difference between fruits & vegetables!

programme.title: E2 - How Does It Work?!
programme.desc: Blippi is wondering, 'How does it work?!' Join Blippi & his robot buddy FETCH on an adventure to find the answers! Blippi shrinks down to fly inside a beehive & learn how honey is made, & explores a garbage truck to find out why flies love it so much. Then, it’s a trip through a factory to see how chocolate is made! The adventure even travels through time as Blippi meets his great-grandpa to see the very first cars. Plus, Blippi & FETCH help a nervous crane learn to build a skyscraper!

programme.title: E2 - How Awesome Things Work!
programme.desc: Blippi wants to find out how awesome things work! He & D.BO visit a construction site where they learn all about safety & how a crane works. Then, they meet Frankie the Firetruck to see all of her amazing fire-fighting abilities in action! After that, it's time for some speed as they meet an F1 race car & a giant monster truck to learn what makes them so special. Finally, Blippi shrinks down to see how a guitar makes beautiful music!

programme.title: E3 - Gentle Lessons & Bedtime
programme.desc: Join Twinkle for some gentle lessons & soothing bedtime songs. First, Twinkle learns about the importance of eating healthy, delicious fruit, like bananas, oranges & grapes. Then, help her find Sandy the Seagull while learning what sounds a pig, duck & cow make! After a long day of learning, it's time to get ready for bed. Listen as Twinkle & Mr. Moon sing a soothing nighttime lullaby to help you relax & drift off to sleep.

programme.title: E2 - Underwater Learning Adventures!
programme.desc: Dive into some underwater learning adventures with The Sharksons! First, join the sea friends as they swim through the alphabet to learn their ABCs. programme.title: E68
programme.desc: Sarah Ferguson presents Australia's premier daily current affairs program, delivering agenda-setting public affairs journalism and interviews that hold the powerful to account. Plus political analysis from Jacob Greber.

programme.title: E12
programme.desc: Australia's leading forum for media analysis and comment. Host Linton Besser, a four-time Walkley award-winning investigative reporter and former foreign correspondent, brings you a fearless critique of the week's journalism.

programme.title: E87
programme.desc: James Glenday and Emma Rebellato bring you the latest news, overnight developments, interviews and new details on the top stories this morning, joined by Catherine Murphy with sport and Lillian Rangiah with weather.

programme.title: E87
programme.desc: As each day begins get the facts you need to stay informed. James Glenday and Emma Rebellato present the latest news, overnight developments and today's top stories, joined by Catherine Murphy, Nate Byrne and Lillian Rangiah.

programme.title: E11 - Autumn: Coastal Succulents & Rustic Natives
programme.desc: Clarence creates a rustic native display, Guest Presenter Thanh bites into delectable dragon fruit, Josh meets a team of smart sniffer dogs that can detect plant disease, and Tammy finds clever plantings on a coastal terrace.

programme.title: Final Rendezvous
programme.desc: The collapse of a major spy case involving a female double agent haunted ASIO throughout the Cold War. A new investigation of surveillance film reveals what went wrong and uncovers a possible KGB murder on Australian soil.

programme.title: E17 - Sacred Send-Offs

programme.title: E19
programme.desc: 程家女名少商，因戰亂自幼被父母留在祖母身邊成為“留守兒童”，嬸孃狼心縱容，意圖將其養成廢人。面對重重陷阱，程少商（趙露思飾）為活命，假荒誕、真苦學，掩蓋鋒芒等待父母歸來。可撥開烏雲見月明時，卻因多年疏離致使親情已難再拾。缺愛的程少商，遇新帝義子凌不疑（吳磊飾）、白鹿山才子袁慎、世家子弟樓垚，三人各有優劣。在選擇適婚者上，程少商既自卑又務實，儘管情感之路頗多坎坷，但她從不後悔自己的每次選擇。在與凌不疑的相處之中，也陰差陽錯捲入了凌不疑的家庭與身世之謎中。種種事件，程少商屢立奇功，也從凌不疑的家庭關係中學會與父母相處之道，以及如何經營自己的愛情。同時程少商與凌不疑也在這些經歷中各自變化成長，慢慢與自己和家庭和解，並堅守內心的正義，攜手化解國家危機，成就一段佳話。

programme.title: E18
programme.desc: 在福建小島漁村長大的段宇成夢想成為一名跳高運動員，在助教羅娜的循序善誘之下，不僅訓練成績突飛猛進，兩人也在朝夕相處過程中情愫悄悄滋生，最終段宇成突破了極限也同時收穫了和羅娜的真摯愛情。

programme.title: Sanju
programme.desc: Sanjay Dutt's life is full of drama. From a film family, he rose to stardom but battled addiction, faced underworld ties, and endured prison. It's a funny and sad story of his fight against himself. Release Year: 2018 Director: Rajkumar Hirani Awards: Filmfare Awards - 2019 Nominee Main Award - Best Film, Awards of the International Indian Film Academy - 2019 Nominee Popular Award - Best Film

programme.desc: 'World Insight With Shih' is a weekly special program with in-depth political and economic commentary. The program consists of three segments: 'Viewing the World with Shih', 'Discussing the Past and Present' and 'Speaking New Words'. The senior commentator Shih Chi Ping analyzes the world's political and economic topics from a unique point of view, and deeply analyzes the global trends to audience.

programme.title: E423
programme.desc: C'EST LA VIE: C'est La Vie focuses on the real experiences of ordinary people amid the tide of the times. Through in-depth interviews and observational filming, it presents a vivid social visual archive of contemporary China with authentic life stories. With profound humanistic care and compelling narrative tension, it has earned widespread acclaim and numerous awards both at home and abroad, establishing itself as a benchmark in Chinese-language documentaries. Continuously conveying warmth and strength, it inspires viewers to reflect deeply on humanity and destiny.
